_comment: COPY entries into episode-extras.json (this .example file is just documentation and is never read at build time). Key each entry by the episode's slug (preferred — readable, e.g. "ep-63-seeking-god") or its id (the RSS guid). Every field is optional. The Spotify fetch never touches episode-extras.json, so anything you put there survives every re-fetch. spotifyUrl is NOT here — the fetch captures it automatically from the feed.

ep-63-seeking-god.transcript:
Eric: Welcome back to the show. Today we're talking about finding your way back.

Guest: Thanks for having me. It's been a long road.

Eric: Start wherever you want — the beginning, the middle, wherever it makes sense to you.
